description:
An open-source ebook reader designed for immersive and deep reading experiences.

Readest is a modern, feature-rich ebook reader designed for avid readers offering seamless cross-platform access, powerful tools, and an intuitive interface to elevate your reading experience.
Release Highlight
- Fonts: Added support for importing local TTF and ODF fonts
- TTS: Reduced the pause between sentences when using Edge TTS
- TTS: Fixed an issue where voices list could not be opened on older versions of iOS
- TOC: Fixed an issue where nested TOC items would not collapse properly in some books
- Translator: Fixed an issue where translations in the popup did not refresh correctly
- Library: Added option to sort authors with last name first
- Layout: Fixed mismatch in close button position between the reader and library pages
- Layout: Book title now remains centered in the available space
- Layout: Fixed footer bar layout in landscape mode
What's Changed
- fix: don't proxy network connection from Tailscale IP addresses, closes #1834 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1835
- css: use monospace font for code blocks when overriding custom book fonts, closes #1805 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1836
- reader: fix collapse of nested TOC for some EPUBs, closes #1820 and closes #1813 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1837
- chore: more aggressive cache for CI by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1839
- layout: fix TTS panel drop down won't open on older iOS, closes #1810 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1841
- css: fix unexpected align center for some EPUBs by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1842
- layout: fix footer bar layout in landscape mode on Android, closes #1803 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1843
- chore: bump tauri to latest dev branch by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1849
- chore: bump next.js, opennext, wrangler and supabase to latest versions by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1851
- fix(translator): refresh translation when provider is changed in translator popup by @lijiahao66666 in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1855
- layout: consistent label font weight for settings panels by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1856
- css: ensure workarounds don’t interfere with body background color by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1859
- feat: support importing TTF/ODF fonts, closes #979 and closes #1708 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1864
- feat: support author sorting (last name first), closes #1799 by @German-Shein-1995 in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1865
- layout: fix position of close button miss-match between reader and library page on Windows and Linux, closes #1866 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1868
- layout: keep book title align center of the blank space when there are window buttons, closes #1867 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1869
- feat: apply custom fonts directly in custom font panel by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1870
- layout: layout tweaks on the custom fonts panel by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1871
- Reuse audio elements in the same paragraph for better TTS performance by @shaqtiktok in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1853
- release: version 0.9.75 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1873
New Contributors
- @lijiahao66666 made their first contribution in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1855
- @German-Shein-1995 made their first contribution in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1865
- @shaqtiktok made their first contribution in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1853
Full Changelog: https://github.com/readest/readest/compare/v0.9.72...v0.9.75
